text_fr: ressees de cooperer avec le Secretaire general lors de la preparation du prochain rapport sur la situation sociale dans le  monde; ·
text_en: to cooperate with the Secretary General in the preparation of the next report on the world social situation; ·

items_fr: Prie le  Secretaire  general  de  presenter  le  pro› chain  rapport sur  la  situation  sociale  dans  le  monde a l' Assemblee  generale  lors  de  sa  trentieme  session,  par l'intermediaire du  Conseil  ~conomique  et  social,  pour qu'elle l'etudie a !'occasion de  l'examen et  de  !'evalua› tion  d'ensemble prevus  pour le  milieu  de  la deuxieme Decennie  des  Nations  Unies  pour  le  developpement, ainsi  que  d'estimer et d'analyser lcs  tendances  relatives au  developpement  social leurs  causes  et  leurs  mani› festations  et  les  experiences  en  matiere  de  developpe› ment dans  le  monde  entier,  y  compris  la  situation dans  les  territoires  coloniaux,  dependants  et  occupes, dans  le  cadre  de  la  conception  unifiee  du  developpe› ment,  en  tenant compte des  dispositions  de  la presente resolution  et  des  deliberations  consacrees a cette  ques› tion  a la  presente  session  de  l' Assemblee  generale,  a la cinquantieme session du Conseil economique et social et a la  vingt-deuxieme  session  de  la  Commission  du developpement  social,  ainsi  que  des  dispositions  de  la Declaration sur le  progres  et le  developpement  dans  le domaine social.
items_en: Requests the Secretary-General to submit the next report on the social situation in the world to the General Assembly at its third session, through the intermediary of the Economic and Social Council, to study it on the occasion of the overall review and appraisal of the situation in the middle of the second United Nations Development Decade, as well as to assess and analyse the trends in social development in their causes and practices and development experiences throughout the world, including the situation in the colonial, dependent and occupied territories, within the framework of the unified conception of development, taking into account the provisions of this resolution and the deliberations devoted to this question at the present session of the General Assembly, at the fifty-fifth session of the Economic and Social Council, and at the twenty-second session of the Social Development Committee.

text_fr: 2783  (XXVI).  Rapport  du  Comite  pour  l'elimination de  la  discrimination  raciale
text_en: 2783 (XXVI). Report of the Committee on the Elimination of Racial Discrimination

text_fr: Rappe/ant sa resolution  2106 (XX) du 21  decembre 1965, par laquelle elle  a  adopte et ouvert a la signature et a la  ratification  la  Convention  internationale  sur !'elimination  de  toutes  les  formes  de  discrimination raciale  et  invite  les  Etats  vises a !'article  17  de  la Convention  a  signer  et  ratifier  sans  retard  ladite Convention,
text_en: Recalling its resolution 2106 (XX) of 21 December 1965, by which it adopted and opened for signature and ratification the International Convention on the Elimination of All Forms of Racial Discrimination and invited the States concerned to sign and ratify the Convention without delay,

text_fr: Soulignant !'importance de  l'cntree en  vigueur  de  la Convention internationale sur !'elimination de toutes les formes  de  discrimination  raciale  et  de  la  creation  du Comite  pour !'elimination de  la discrimination  raciale, et priant tous les Etats parties a la Convention de  colla› borer  pleinement  avec  ledit  Comite  afin  qu'il  puisse s'acquitter du mandat qui  lui  a  ete confere  aux  termes de la Convention,
text_en: Stressing the importance of the effective implementation of the International Convention on the Elimination of All Forms of Racial Discrimination and of the establishment of the Committee on the Elimination of Racial Discrimination, and calling upon all States parties to the Convention to cooperate fully with the Committee so that it can fulfil its mandate under the Convention,

text_fr: Prenant  note des  recommandations  contenues  dans la resolution  1588 (L) du Conseil economique et social, en  date du 21  mai  1971,
text_en: Taking note of the recommendations contained in Economic and Social Council Resolution 1588 (L) of 21 May 1971,

text_fr: Ayant reru le  rapport  du  Comite  pour !'elimination de  la  discrimination  raciale 4 , cree  en  vertu  de  la Convention  internationale  sur  !'elimination  de  toutes les formes  de  discrimination  raciale,  concernant  sa deuxieme  annee  d'activite,
text_en: Having read back the report of the Committee on the Elimination of Racial Discrimination 4 , established under the International Convention on the Elimination of All Forms of Racial Discrimination, concerning its second year of activity,

text_fr: Exprimant sa  satisfaction devant le  fait  que 55 Etats ont ratifie  la Convention  OU  y  ant  adhere  et que  plu› sieurs  autres Etats ont exprime lcur intention de  ratifier ladite Convention ou d'y adherer dans un proche avenir,
text_en: Expressing its satisfaction at the fact that 55 States have ratified or acceded to the Convention and that many other States have expressed their intention to ratify or accede to the Convention in the near future,

items_fr: 1. Invite  instamment tous  les  Etats  qui  ne  sont  pas encore  parties a la Convention  internationale  sur  !'eli› mination de toutes les formes de discrimination raciale a ratifier  cet  instrument  ou a y  adherer  le  plus  rapide› ment  possible  et  prie  lesdits  Etats  de  faire  rapport a l' Assemblee  generale  sur  les  mesures  qu'ils ant  prises a cet  effet,  sur  les  obstacles  qu'ils peuvent  avoir  ren-
items_en: 1. Urges all States which are not yet parties to the International Convention on the Elimination of All Forms of Racial Discrimination to ratify or accede to the Convention as soon as possible and requests the States concerned to report to the General Assembly on the measures they have taken to this effect, on the obstacles they may have encountered in the implementation of the Convention;

text_fr: res  et  sur  toutes  les  mesures  qu'ils  peuvent  avoir prises a titre  interimaire  pour  se  conformer  strictement aux  principes  enonces  dans la Declaration  des  Nations Unies  sur  !'elimination de  toutes  les  formes  de  discri› mination  raciale  et dans  la Convention;
text_en: and all measures they may have taken in the interim to comply strictly with the principles set out in the Declaration of the United Nations on the Elimination of All Forms of Racial Discrimination and in the Convention;

items_fr: 2. Prend  acte  avec  satisfaction du  rapport  du Comite  pour !'elimination de  la discrimination  raciale, presente en  vertu  de  !'article 9  de  la Convention,  con› cernant sa deuxieme  annee  d'activite;
3. Appelle l' attention de  tous les  Etats sur le  conte› nu  de  ce  rapport;

4. Felicite le  Comite pour !'elimination de  la discri› mination  raciale  des  efforts  qu'il  a  faits  pour  obtenir des  Etats  parties  des  rapports  detailles,  conformement au  paragraphe  1  de  !'article 9  de  la Convention,  ainsi que  des  renseignements  sur  les  territoires  sous  tutelle et  les  territoires  non  autonomes  pour  ce  qui  est  des questions  visees  a !'article 15;

5. Exprime  !'opinion que  les  travaux  du  Comite pour  !'elimination de  la  discriminaton  raciale  seraient facilites  si  les  rapports  presentes  par  lcs  Etats  parties etaient conformes  aux directives  etablies a cette fin  par le  Comite  et  si  celui-ci  invitait  les  Etats  parties a etre presents  a  ses  reunions  quand  leurs  rapports  sont examines;

6. Reconna'it que  rexamen  par  l'Assemblee gene› ralc  des  rapports  du  Comite  pour  !'elimination de  la discrimination raciale  serait facilite  si  l'on y incluait les criteres  utilises  par le  Comite  pour  examiner  quant  au fond  de  maniere  plus  detaillee  les  rapports  presentes par  Jes  Etats  parties  conformement  a !'article 9  de  la Convention;

7. Appelle  ['attention du  Conseil  de  tutelle  et  du Comite  special  charge  d'etudier la situation  en  ce  qui concerne  !'application de  la Declaration  sur  l'octroi de l'independance aux  pays  et  aux  peuples  coloniaux  sur le  rapport  du  Comite  pour  !'elimination de  la  discri› mination  raciale  et  Jes  prie  de  prendre  les  mesures voulues,  dans  le  cadre  de  leur  mandat  et  dans  leurs domaines  respectifs  d'activite, telles  qu'elles sont  indi› quecs  dans  les  parties  pertinentes  du  rapport;

8. Prie le Secretaire  general  de  communiquer  au Comite  pour  !'elimination de  la  discrimination  raciale Jes comptes  rendus  des  debats  auxquels  son  rapport a  donne  lieu  !ors  de  la  vingt-sixieme  session  de  l'As› scmblec  generale.
items_en: 2. Takes note with satisfaction of the report of the Committee on the Elimination of Racial Discrimination, submitted under article 9 of the Convention, concerning its second year of activity;
3. Draws the attention of all States to the nude tale of this report;

4. Congratulates the Committee on the Elimination of Racial Discrimination on its efforts to obtain detailed reports from States parties, in accordance with article 9, paragraph 1, of the Convention, as well as information on Trust and Non-Self-Governing Territories with regard to the matters referred to in article 15;

5. Expresses the view that the work of the Committee on the Elimination of Racial Discrimination would be facilitated if the reports submitted by the States Parties were in accordance with the guidelines established for that purpose by the Committee and if the Committee invited the States Parties to its meetings when their reports were examined;

6. Recognise that the review by the Assembly of the reports of the Committee on the Elimination of Racial Discrimination would be facilitated if the criteria used by the Committee to examine the substance of the reports submitted by States Parties in accordance with Article 9 of the Convention were included;

7. Calls upon the Trusteeship Council and the Special Committee to study the situation with regard to the implementation of the Declaration on the Granting of Independence to Colonial Countries and Peoples on the report of the Committee on the Elimination of Racial Discrimination, and I request that appropriate measures be taken, within their respective mandates and areas of activity, as indicated in the relevant parts of the report;

8. Requests the Secretary General to communicate to the Committee for the Elimination of Racial Discrimination I report on the debates that took place during the twenty-sixth session of the As› scmblec generale.

text_fr: 2784  (XXVI).  Elimination  de  toutes  les  formes de  discrimination  raciale
text_en: 2784 (XXVI). Elimination of all forms of racial discrimination

text_fr: Fermement convaincue que  toutes les  formes  de  dis› crimination  raciale  constituent  une  negation  totale  des buts  et  principes  de  la  Charte  des  Nations  Unies  et qu'elles vont a l'encontre du progres humain, de la paix et  de  la  justice,
text_en: Strongly convinced that all forms of racial discrimination constitute a total negation of the purposes and principles of the Charter of the United Nations and that they run counter to human progress, peace and justice,

text_fr: Pleinement  consciente que !'apartheid et  toutes  Jes autres  formes  de  discrimination  raciale  sont des  instru› ments  du  colonialisme  et  de  l'imperialisme  ainsi  que de  !'exploitation economique,
text_en: Fully aware that apartheid and all other forms of racial discrimination are instruments of colonialism and imperialism and economic exploitation,

text_fr: Reaffirmant sa conviction que toute doctrine d'exclu› sion fondee sur la differenciation  raciale ou sur la supe› riorite ethnique ou religieuse est scientifiquement fausse, moralcmcnt  reprehensible  et  socialement  injuste,
text_en: Reaffirming its conviction that any doctrine of exclusion based on racial differentiation or ethnic or religious supremacy is scientifically false, morally reprehensible and socially unjust,
